Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I vaguely remember Mr. Edogawa's[n]long supplementary lectures here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what Mr. Edogawa's[n]"medicine" was really for...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I heard Mr. Edogawa has sick students[n]drink a strange concoction. I wonder why...[n]{f 1 1}
